title: Medullary cystic disease
body_html:
Medullary cystic disease is autosomal dominant condition that leads to progressive tubulointerstitial fibrosis and renal failure. It is due to a defect in the gene which encodes either mucin-1 or uromodulin.

Features
  • renal failure
  • small kidneys
